$schema: Curated org_tag_vocabulary seed examples. Each `set` represents one industry / department. Pick a set during onboarding, customize the descriptions to match the org's mental model, then POST each tag via `personize v1.1 context tags create --type-name <canonical_tag> --label <label> --description <description>` (or `client.v1_1.context.createTag`). The 'description' MUST follow the 'Use for: X. Not for: Y.' pattern -- it is injected into the LLM section-selector prompt to reject plausible-but-wrong docs that happen to share a tag.

$constraints.canonical_tag: regex ^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]{1,59}$ -- lowercase only, may include digits, _, -, no spaces
$constraints.label: 1-80 chars human-readable display name
$constraints.description: <= 150 chars recommended; format: 'Use for: X. Not for: Y.'
$constraints.aliases: <= 20 entries, each follows same regex as canonical_tag; used for snap-time exact matching

sets.name: B2B Sales
sets.description: Outbound prospecting, opportunity management, and sales playbooks for B2B revenue teams

tags.label: ICP
tags.description: Use for: Ideal Customer Profile definitions, qualification criteria, target segment rules. Not for: individual account research or contact-level notes.

tags.label: Cold Email
tags.description: Use for: cold outbound email templates, sequences, subject-line guidelines. Not for: replies, nurture content, or in-account expansion emails.

tags.label: Discovery Call
tags.description: Use for: discovery call agendas, qualification questions, BANT/MEDDIC frameworks. Not for: post-demo follow-up or proposal docs.

tags.label: Demo Script
tags.description: Use for: product demo flows, talking points, feature highlight scripts. Not for: technical product documentation or training material.

tags.label: Objection Handling
tags.description: Use for: scripted responses to common buyer objections (price, competitor, timing, authority). Not for: post-loss analysis.

tags.label: Proposal
tags.description: Use for: proposal templates, SOW structures, MSA boilerplate. Not for: signed contracts or executed orders.

tags.label: Competitor Positioning
tags.description: Use for: competitor battlecards, differentiation talking points, head-to-head comparisons. Not for: general market research.

tags.label: Deal Stage Criteria
tags.description: Use for: stage-gate exit criteria for the sales pipeline (e.g. what makes a deal SQL vs SAL). Not for: forecast methodology.

sets.name: Customer Success
sets.description: Health scoring, QBRs, renewals, expansion, and proactive churn-prevention playbooks

tags.label: Health Score
tags.description: Use for: account health scoring rubrics, signal weightings, health-grade definitions. Not for: per-account health reports.

tags.label: QBR
tags.description: Use for: Quarterly Business Review templates, agendas, post-QBR follow-up workflows. Not for: per-account QBR decks.

tags.label: Renewal Playbook
tags.description: Use for: renewal timeline, escalation paths, retention playbooks. Not for: pricing or contract negotiation.

tags.label: Expansion
tags.description: Use for: upsell triggers, cross-sell motions, expansion-revenue plays. Not for: new-logo prospecting.

tags.label: Churn Risk
tags.description: Use for: churn-risk signals, detection playbooks, escalation runbooks. Not for: post-mortem on lost accounts.

tags.label: CSAT
tags.description: Use for: customer satisfaction survey design, NPS methodology, CES analysis. Not for: support ticket triage.

sets.name: Marketing
sets.description: Brand voice, demand-gen, content strategy, and lifecycle marketing playbooks

tags.label: Brand Voice
tags.description: Use for: tone-of-voice rules, terminology lists, do/don't word lists. Not for: visual identity or design guidelines.

tags.label: Demand Generation
tags.description: Use for: paid acquisition playbooks, landing-page conversion patterns, campaign briefs. Not for: organic SEO or content marketing strategy.

tags.label: Content Strategy
tags.description: Use for: editorial calendars, topic clusters, content-funnel mapping. Not for: individual blog posts or content pieces.

tags.label: Lifecycle Marketing
tags.description: Use for: lifecycle email sequences, behavioral triggers, nurture playbooks. Not for: one-off broadcast campaigns.

tags.label: ABM
tags.description: Use for: account-based marketing playbooks, target-account selection, ABM campaign briefs. Not for: high-volume MQL acquisition.

tags.label: Webinar
tags.description: Use for: webinar production checklists, registration funnels, post-event follow-up. Not for: on-demand video library.

sets.name: Healthcare
sets.description: HIPAA-aware patient engagement, care coordination, and clinical communication patterns

tags.label: HIPAA
tags.description: Use for: HIPAA compliance rules, PHI handling, BAA workflows. Not for: general security or GDPR-only guidance.

tags.label: Care Plan
tags.description: Use for: care-plan templates, adherence workflows, milestone tracking. Not for: clinical assessment forms.

tags.label: Patient Outreach
tags.description: Use for: appointment reminders, follow-up scripts, adherence nudges. Not for: marketing campaigns to non-patients.

tags.label: Clinical Content
tags.description: Use for: patient education content, clinical FAQs, plain-language medical explainers. Not for: physician-to-physician clinical decision support.

tags.label: Telehealth
tags.description: Use for: virtual-visit workflows, pre-visit checklists, technical-readiness scripts. Not for: in-person clinical operations.

sets.name: Recruiting / Talent
sets.description: Sourcing, candidate engagement, interview structure, and offer-stage playbooks

tags.label: Sourcing
tags.description: Use for: candidate sourcing playbooks, LinkedIn search strategies, Boolean queries. Not for: post-interview follow-up.

tags.label: Interview Rubric
tags.description: Use for: structured interview scorecards, competency rubrics, debrief templates. Not for: take-home assignments.

tags.label: Candidate Outreach
tags.description: Use for: passive-candidate email templates, InMail sequences. Not for: post-offer or onboarding messaging.

tags.label: Offer Stage
tags.description: Use for: offer letters, comp-conversation scripts, counter-offer handling. Not for: pre-interview screening.

tags.label: DEIB
tags.description: Use for: diversity-equity-inclusion-belonging hiring guidelines, inclusive-language rules. Not for: post-hire training programs.

sets.name: E-Commerce
sets.description: Product merchandising, lifecycle messaging, and post-purchase customer-experience playbooks

tags.label: Product Listing
tags.description: Use for: PLP/PDP copy guidelines, attribute taxonomies, image-spec rules. Not for: catalog data quality or PIM workflows.

tags.label: Cart Abandonment
tags.description: Use for: cart-abandonment recovery sequences, retargeting templates. Not for: post-purchase re-engagement.

tags.label: Post-Purchase
tags.description: Use for: post-purchase email, review-request workflows, replenishment reminders. Not for: pre-purchase nurture or cart recovery.

tags.label: Loyalty
tags.description: Use for: loyalty-program tier rules, points mechanics, reward-redemption flows. Not for: one-off promotional discounts.

tags.label: Promotion
tags.description: Use for: promotional pricing rules, BOGO mechanics, sitewide-sale playbooks. Not for: long-term pricing strategy.

sets.name: SaaS Product
sets.description: Product-led-growth, in-app experience, release notes, and developer-relations content patterns

tags.label: PLG
tags.description: Use for: product-led-growth playbooks, self-serve activation flows, freemium-to-paid conversion patterns. Not for: enterprise sales.

tags.label: In-App Message
tags.description: Use for: in-app tooltip copy, banner notices, empty-state messaging. Not for: external email or push notifications.

tags.label: Release Notes
tags.description: Use for: customer-facing changelog entries, feature-announcement copy. Not for: internal engineering changelogs.

tags.label: API Docs
tags.description: Use for: API reference structure, code-sample style guides, SDK quickstart patterns. Not for: internal architecture docs.

tags.label: DevRel
tags.description: Use for: developer-relations content patterns, community engagement playbooks, OSS contribution guides. Not for: internal developer experience.

sets.name: Operations / Internal
sets.description: Internal SOPs, vendor management, security policy, and people-ops content patterns

tags.label: SOP
tags.description: Use for: standard-operating-procedure documents, step-by-step runbooks. Not for: high-level strategy docs.

tags.label: Vendor Management
tags.description: Use for: vendor evaluation criteria, procurement workflows, RFP templates. Not for: customer-facing contracts.

tags.label: InfoSec
tags.description: Use for: information-security policies, access-control rules, incident-response runbooks. Not for: compliance auditing.

tags.label: People Operations
tags.description: Use for: HR policies, performance-review templates, internal-comms guidelines. Not for: external recruiting.

tags.label: OKR
tags.description: Use for: OKR-setting frameworks, quarterly planning templates. Not for: per-team execution plans.
